heading: System certification
label: 1456 System certification
text: Not later than 6 months after , the Director of the Office of Management and Budget shall update and revise section 33.4 of OMB Circular A–11 to reflect the recommendations regarding such Circular made in the Commerce Spectrum Management Advisory Committee Incentive Subcommittee report, adopted .February 22, 2012January 11, 2011
